title: VLAN Misassignment
summary: Student investigates a suspected VLAN access-port misassignment.
student_goal: Verify whether the device is connected to the correct VLAN and document the switchport evidence.

required_evidence.label: Switchport status
required_evidence.description: Student must provide switchport/interface status evidence.

required_evidence.label: Assigned VLAN
required_evidence.description: Student must confirm the access VLAN assigned to the port.

required_evidence.label: Expected VLAN
required_evidence.description: Student must identify the VLAN the endpoint should be using.

opening_questions: Which switchport is the endpoint connected to?
What VLAN is currently assigned to that port?
What VLAN should the endpoint be in?
mentor_guidance_rules: Do not suggest changing a switchport until the current interface and VLAN are identified.
Ask for evidence from show commands before confirming the fix.
Confirm whether the port is access or trunk before giving guidance.
